mapper.sql: ORDER BY (B.FIXED_TOP_FLAG, '0') DESC , B.REG_DATE DESC , B.NOTICE_NUM DESC
mapper.select:
SELECT A.SUBJECT, A.REG_DATE, A.NOTICE_NUM, A.GATE_CD, A.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM, A.SUBJECT, A.ATT_FILE_NUM FROM ( SELECT NOTC.SUBJECT, (NOTC.REG_DATE, 'yyyy/MM/dd') AS REG_DATE, NOTC.NOTICE_NUM, NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM, NOTC.SUBJECT, NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY (NOTC.FIXED_TOP_FLAG, '0') DESC, NOTC.REG_DATE DESC) AS ROW_NUM FROM STOCNOTC NOTC WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE IN ('PCN', 'PCP') AND NOTC.VIEW_TYPE IN ('USNA', 'USNE', 'USXX') AND NOTC.START_DATE >= SYSDATE - 30
) A WHERE A.ROW_NUM <= 2

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT
TOP 99999999
NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM , NOTC.GATE_CD FROM STOCNOTC NOTC WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = '100' AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE = 'PCN' -- 게시판구분 : 공지사항 AND NOTC.VIEW_TYPE IN ('USNA') -- 공지구분 : 전체 AND NOTC.POPUP_FLAG = '1' -- 공지여부 : Yes AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND NOTC.START_DATE >= SYSDATE AND NOTC.END_DATE <= SYSDATE
AND CONVERT(CHAR(8), NOTC.START_DATE , 112) >= CONVERT(CHAR(8), SYSDATE , 112) AND CONVERT(CHAR(8), NOTC.END_DATE , 112) <=CONVERT(CHAR(8), SYSDATE , 112)
ORDER BY (NOTC.FIXED_TOP_FLAG, '0') DESC , REG_DATE DESC , NOTICE_NUM DESC ) A

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT
TOP 4
NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , NOTC.SUBJECT ,(NOTC.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM STOCNOTC NOTC WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = '100' AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE = 'PCN' -- 게시판구분 : 공지사항 AND NOTC.VIEW_TYPE IN ('USNA') -- 공지구분 : 전체 AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND TO_CHAR(NOTC.START_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AND TO_CHAR(NOTC.END_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd')
AND CONVERT(CHAR(8), NOTC.START_DATE , 112) <= CONVERT(CHAR(8), SYSDATE , 112) AND CONVERT(CHAR(8), NOTC.END_DATE , 112) >= CONVERT(CHAR(8), SYSDATE , 112)
ORDER BY (NOTC.FIXED_TOP_FLAG, '0') DESC, NOTC.REG_DATE DESC, NOTC.NOTICE_NUM DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT A.SUBJECT, A.REG_DATE, A.NOTICE_NUM, A.GATE_CD, A.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM FROM ( SELECT NOTC.SUBJECT, (NOTC.REG_DATE, 'yyyy/MM/dd') AS REG_DATE, NOTC.NOTICE_NUM, NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY (NOTC.FIXED_TOP_FLAG, '0') DESC, NOTC.REG_DATE DESC) AS ROW_NUM FROM STOCNOTC NOTC WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE = UPPER(SF_TRIM('PCF')) AND NOTC.VIEW_TYPE IN ('USNA', 'USNE', 'USXX') AND NOTC.START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND NOTC.END_DATE >= SYSDATE ) A WHERE A.ROW_NUM <= 7
mapper.sql: SELECT NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , NOTC.SUBJECT , (NOTC.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE , NOTC.FIXED_TOP_FLAG , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NOTC.NOTICE_NUM DESC) AS RN FROM STOCNOTC NOTC JOIN STOCTXTH TXTH ON (NOTC.GATE_CD = TXTH.GATE_CD AND NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM = TXTH.TEXT_NUM) WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = '100' AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE = 'PCN' -- 게시판구분 : 공지사항 AND NOTC.VIEW_TYPE IN ('USNA') -- 공지구분 : 전체 AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT A.BUYER_CD , A.ANN_ITEM_TITLE , A.SUBJECT , A.REG_DATE , A.ANN_NO , A.BID_NUM , A.BID_CNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.REG_DATE DESC, A.BID_NUM DESC) AS RN , A.DEPT_NM , A.BID_USER_NM , A.BID_STATUS FROM ( SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT ,(CASE WHEN HD.BID_STATUS IN ('2303', '2330') THEN '[취소]' ELSE CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE1 = 'GC' THEN '[일반]' WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE1 = 'LC' THEN '[제한]' END END) AS ANN_ITEM_TITLE , HD.ANN_NO , HD.ANN_ITEM AS SUBJECT , (HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE , GETDEPTNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM , HD.BID_STATUS FROM STOCBDHD HD WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND HD.BID_STATUS NOT IN ('1300', '9999') -- 유찰, 취소입찰건 제외 AND HD.CONT_TYPE1 IN ('GC','LC') -- 제한경쟁, 일반경쟁 AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND (HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) A WHERE 1 = 1

if.test: selectType eq 'title'.toString() and searchText != null and searchText != ''
selectType eq 'contents'.toString() and searchText != null and searchText != ''
selectType eq 'all'.toString() and searchText != null and searchText != ''

sql.if: AND NOTC.SUBJECT LIKE '%' #{searchText} '%' OR TXTH.TEXT_CONTENTS LIKE '%' #{searchText} '%'

if.test: selectType eq 'title'.toString() and searchText != null and searchText != ''
selectType eq 'bid_nm'.toString() and searchText != null and searchText != ''
selectType eq 'dept_nm'.toString() and searchText != null and searchText != ''
selectType eq 'bid_user_nm'.toString() and searchText != null and searchText != ''

mapper.select: SELECT NOTC.SUBJECT , NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM , GETTOCHAR (NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as START_DATE , GETTOCHAR (NOTC.END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as END_DATE , GETTOCHAR (NOTC.REG_DATE, ' YYYY-MM-DD') REG_DATE , GETUSERNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID , 'KO') AS REG_USER_NM , NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCNOTC NOTC JOIN STOCTXTH TXTH ON (NOTC.GATE_CD = TXTH.GATE_CD AND NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM = TXTH.TEXT_NUM) WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = '100' AND NOTC.NOTICE_NUM = #{NOTICE_NUM} AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCNOTC NOTC JOIN STOCTXTH TXTH ON(NOTC.GATE_CD = TXTH.GATE_CD AND NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM = TXTH.TEXT_NUM) WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = '100' AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE = 'PCN' -- 게시판구분 : 공지사항 AND NOTC.VIEW_TYPE IN ('USNA') -- 공지구분 : 전체 AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , HD.ANN_NO ,(CASE WHEN HD.BID_STATUS IN ('2303', '2330') THEN '[취소]' ELSE CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE1 = 'GC' THEN '[일반]' WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE1 = 'LC' THEN '[제한]' END END) AS ANN_ITEM_TITLE , HD.ANN_ITEM AS SUBJECT , (HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE , GETDEPTNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM , HD.BID_STATUS FROM STOCBDHD HD WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND HD.BID_STATUS NOT IN ('1300', '9999') -- 유찰, 취소입찰건 제외 AND HD.CONT_TYPE1 IN ('GC','LC') -- 제한경쟁, 일반경쟁 AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' --페이징 안되는 이슈 해결 - List 뽑는것과 조건 같게 설정 - 20.11.18 AND (HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') --페이징 안되는 이슈 해결 - List 뽑는것과 조건 같게 설정 - 20.11.18 ) A WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT A.BUYER_CD , A.ANN_ITEM , A.ANN_DATE , A.BID_NUM , A.BID_CNT , A.ANN_ITEM_TITLE , A.BID_STATUS FROM ( SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT ,(CASE WHEN HD.BID_STATUS IN ('2303', '2330') THEN '[취소]' ELSE CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE1 = 'GC' THEN '[일반]' WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE1 = 'LC' THEN '[제한]' END END) AS ANN_ITEM_TITLE , ANN_ITEM , HD.REG_DATE , (HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ANN_DATE , HD.BID_STATUS FROM STOCBDHD HD WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND HD.BID_STATUS NOT IN ('1300', '9999') -- 유찰, 취소입찰건 제외 AND HD.CONT_TYPE1 IN ('GC','LC') -- 제한경쟁, 일반경쟁 AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND (HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) A ORDER BY A.ANN_DATE DESC ) B WHERE ROWNUM <= 4
SELECT UUID , UUID_SQ , REAL_FILE_NM FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = #{ATT_FILE_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT NOTC.SUBJECT , NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM ,(NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYY')'년 ' (NOTC.START_DATE, 'MM') '월 ' (NOTC.START_DATE, 'DD') '일' AS START_DATE ,(NOTC.END_DATE, 'YYYY')'년 ' (NOTC.END_DATE, 'MM') '월 ' (NOTC.END_DATE, 'DD') '일' AS END_DATE , NOTC.COMMENT1 AS UNIT_PRC_TEXT , NOTC.COMMENT2 AS AP_TEXT
, SUBSTR(OGCM.IRS_NUM, 0, 3)'-' SUBSTR(OGCM.IRS_NUM, 4, 2)'-' SUBSTR(OGCM.IRS_NUM, 6) AS IRS_NUM_TEXT , OGCM.IRS_NUM AS IRS_NUM , OGCM.BUYER_NM AS COMPANY_NM ,OGCM.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM ,OGCM.ZIP_CD AS ZIP_CD ,OGCM.ADDR AS ADDR1 , NULL AS ADDR2 ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')'년 ' (SYSDATE, 'MM') '월 ' (SYSDATE, 'DD') '일' AS SIGN_DATE_TEXT ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI:SS') AS SIGN_DATE
, CUST.IRS_NUM AS VENDOR_IRS_NUM , CUST.CUST_NM AS VENDOR_NM ,CUST.CEO_USER_NM AS VENDOR_CEO_NM ,CUST.ZIP_CD AS VENDOR_ZIP_CD ,CUST.ADDR1 AS VENDOR_ADDR1 ,CUST.ADDR2 AS VENDOR_ADDR2
, VNGL.IRS_NO AS VENDOR_IRS_NUM , VNGL.VENDOR_NM AS VENDOR_NM ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS VENDOR_CEO_NM ,VNGL.HQ_ZIP_CD AS VENDOR_ZIP_CD ,VNGL.HQ_ADDR_1 AS VENDOR_ADDR1 ,VNGL.HQ_ADDR_2 AS VENDOR_ADDR2
FROM STOCNOTC NOTC LEFT JOIN STOCOGCM OGCM ON (NOTC.GATE_CD = OGCM.GATE_CD AND OGCM.BUYER_CD = #{OPERATOR_CD} AND OGCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (NOTC.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND UPPER(CVUR.USER_ID) = UPPER(#{USER_ID}) AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0')
LEFT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = CUST.CUST_CD)
LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD)
WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{GATE_CD} AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE = 'CMS' -- commission(이용수수료) AND NOTC.FIXED_TOP_FLAG = '1' -- 최종여부 AND NOTC.POPUP_FLAG = '1' -- 확정여부(확정=1) AND NOTC.VIEW_TYPE = #{viewType} -- SC : 사업자 ASP 이용계약서, PC : 사용자 개인정보 및 이용약관 AND TO_CHAR(NOTC.START_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AND TO_CHAR(NOTC.END_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND NOTC.NOTICE_NUM = #{ASP_NOTICE_NUM}
AND NOTC.NOTICE_NUM NOT IN (SELECT TEXT2 FROM STOCCODD WHERE CODE_TYPE = 'M406')
ORDER BY NOTC.MOD_DATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM = 1
